# Applied AI Society Documentation

> Public documentation for the Applied AI Society: playbooks, philosophy, concepts, roles, and frameworks for the applied AI economy.

## Docs

- [What is the Applied AI Society?](https://docs.appliedaisociety.org/docs/about)
- [The Applied AI Literacy Earthshot](https://docs.appliedaisociety.org/docs/applied-ai-literacy/earthshot): Our commitment: the best open-source applied AI literacy source material in the world, co-created by the leading practitioners in the world. The foundation from which all courses, tools, and translations derive.
- [Applied AI Literacy](https://docs.appliedaisociety.org/docs/applied-ai-literacy): Applied AI Society champions applied AI literacy: the ability to understand what AI can do and put it to work on real problems. Courses, frameworks, and resources coming soon.
